posts.author: einavpeleg (Einav Peleg)
posts.cookedHtml:
I noticed something somewhat annoying, maybe there is a solution I’m not aware of.

The date question in the form appears to show American date format although we are in Israel.

And also when using mobile:

WhatsApp Image 2024-05-20 at 21.39.49_f0ee229d1125×374 14.4 KB

I came across recently with a device that showed the correct format although i didn’t investigate properly, shame on me…

Any reason what can affect this formatting and can it be configured?

Thank you!

posts.author: lwatkins31 (Lee Watkins)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Einav, I’m not sure if this is possible natively but here is a workaround. The solution in this conversation suggests using a Formula column to translate the date into the format you want: Change Date Format

image914×566 26.1 KB

posts.author: einavpeleg (Einav Peleg)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @lwatkins31, thanks for the answer but my question was about the placeholder and date formatting in the question in the form itself, not the submitted data.

posts.author: Fario_Consulting (Fario Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Einav,
Does changing the date format on the actual column in Monday change it in the form?
